svg.title: Educating the AI-Augmented
svg.desc: Full wrap SVG composition template for a 6x9 book cover. Includes back cover, spine, and front cover groups, plus image placeholder groups and text overlay groups for title, subtitle, author, back cover copy, and spine text.

g.text: A practical operating system for making education work reliably in the AI era.
AI is not just changing how students write.
It is changing how they learn—and how we must

text.tspan: The 'Black Box' of student output is growing. Traditional grading
is failing because it measures the product, not the process.
As AI Fakers increase and domain depth declines, educators
face a crisis of trust and verification debt.
Educating the AI-Augmented provides a practical roadmap for
restoring integrity to the modern classroom.
• Map the 4 Student Postures and identify 'The Ghost'
• Implement Individual Integrity Packets (IIPs)
• Shift from grading outputs to auditing reasoning trails
• Solve the 'Verification Debt' in automated assignments
• Build a Glass Box Classroom that scales with AI
For educators, administrators, and instructional designers ready to
move beyond the panic and lead the future of learning.
Dr. Darren Pulsipher is a digital transformation leader, author,
and host of the Embracing Digital Transformation podcast,
reaching over 200,000 subscribers and more than one million
monthly listeners.
He is the creator of the AI-Augmented Operating System (AAOS),
a framework for turning AI into reliable, scalable work.
Educating the
AI-Augmented
Why Learning Must Change
in the Age of AI
